requirement_topic.en: Transport Safety — UN 38.3 Classification and Dangerous-Goods Shipping to Bahrain
requirement_topic.zh: 运输安全——UN 38.3分类及运往巴林的危险货物运输
requirement_topic.zht: 運輸安全——UN 38.3分類及運往巴林的危險貨物運輸

summary.en: Lithium batteries and power banks are classified as dangerous goods for transport and must pass UN 38.3 testing (UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, sub-section 38.3) before being shipped to Bahrain by sea or air. This requirement comes from the international transport regime, not Bahrain domestic law, and applies to every consignment: (1) UN 38.3 test summary must be available for the cells and the battery/pack; (2) air shipments follow IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (based on ICAO Technical Instructions), including state-of-charge and packing-instruction limits for UN3480 (lithium-ion batteries) and UN3481 (batteries in/with equipment); (3) sea shipments to Khalifa Bin Salman Port follow the IMDG Code. Correct UN numbers, packaging, marking, labelling, and a dangerous-goods declaration are required. This is in addition to BSMD/GSO product conformity, which governs market placement rather than transport.
summary.zh: 锂电池和移动电源在运输中被列为危险货物，经海运或空运发往巴林前须通过UN 38.3检测（《联合国试验和标准手册》第三部分第38.3节）。该要求来自国际运输规则而非巴林国内法，适用于每一批货：（1）须备有电芯及电池/电池组的UN 38.3检测摘要；（2）空运遵循IATA《危险货物规则》（基于ICAO技术指令），包括UN3480（锂离子电池）和UN3481（设备内/随设备电池）的荷电状态及包装说明限值；（3）海运至哈利法·本·萨勒曼港遵循IMDG规则。须有正确的UN编号、包装、标记、标签及危险货物申报。此为BSMD/GSO产品符合性之外的要求，后者管辖市场投放而非运输。
summary.zht: 鋰電池和行動電源在運輸中被列為危險貨物，經海運或空運發往巴林前須通過UN 38.3檢測（《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》第三部分第38.3節）。該要求來自國際運輸規則而非巴林國內法，適用於每一批貨：（1）須備有電芯及電池/電池組的UN 38.3檢測摘要；（2）空運遵循IATA《危險貨物規則》（基於ICAO技術指令），包括UN3480（鋰離子電池）和UN3481（設備內/隨設備電池）的荷電狀態及包裝說明限值；（3）海運至哈利法·本·薩勒曼港遵循IMDG規則。須有正確的UN編號、包裝、標記、標籤及危險貨物申報。此為BSMD/GSO產品符合性之外的要求，後者管轄市場投放而非運輸。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, sub-section 38.3 (UN 38.3) — lithium battery transport testing
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR) / ICAO Technical Instructions — air transport (UN3480, UN3481)
IMDG Code — International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code (sea transport to Khalifa Bin Salman Port)

summary.en: China applies the same international transport regime for outbound lithium battery shipments. UN 38.3 testing is required, and Chinese exporters are familiar with it via GB 38031 / GB/T 38031-type references for some battery categories and the air/sea identification appraisal report (航空/海运运输条件鉴定书, transport-conditions appraisal) commonly required by Chinese carriers and forwarders before export. So at the transport level the underlying test (UN 38.3) is the same; the Chinese-side documents are the transport-conditions appraisal and the UN 38.3 test summary held by the manufacturer.
summary.zh: 中国对出境锂电池货物适用相同的国际运输规则。须进行UN 38.3检测，中国出口商通过部分电池类别的GB 38031 / GB/T 38031类引用，以及中国承运人和货代在出口前通常要求的航空/海运运输条件鉴定书对此较为熟悉。因此在运输层面，基础检测（UN 38.3）相同；中国侧文件为运输条件鉴定书及制造商持有的UN 38.3检测摘要。
summary.zht: 中國對出境鋰電池貨物適用相同的國際運輸規則。須進行UN 38.3檢測，中國出口商透過部分電池類別的GB 38031 / GB/T 38031類引用，以及中國承運人和貨代在出口前通常要求的航空/海運運輸條件鑑定書對此較為熟悉。因此在運輸層面，基礎檢測（UN 38.3）相同；中國側文件為運輸條件鑑定書及製造商持有的UN 38.3檢測摘要。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 — UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, 38.3 (same international basis)
China air/sea transport-conditions appraisal report (运输条件鉴定书) — domestic export-side document referencing UN 38.3 / IATA / IMDG

gap.en: The transport layer is the most aligned between the two regimes because UN 38.3 is an international standard recognised both for Chinese export and for shipment into Bahrain. The practical gap is documentation and routing, not a new test: the exporter must ensure the UN 38.3 test summary is current and matches the exact cell/pack, prepare IATA DGR (air) or IMDG (sea) compliant packaging, marking and labelling, and provide a dangerous-goods declaration for the consignment to Bahrain. The Chinese transport-conditions appraisal supports but does not replace correct IATA/IMDG paperwork for the destination leg. UN 38.3 is a transport requirement only and does not satisfy BSMD/GSO product conformity or TRA type approval.
gap.zh: 运输层面在两套制度间最为一致，因为UN 38.3是国际标准，中国出口与运入巴林均予认可。实际差距在于文件与路线，而非新增检测：出口商须确保UN 38.3检测摘要为最新并与具体电芯/电池组匹配，准备符合IATA DGR（空运）或IMDG（海运）的包装、标记和标签，并为运往巴林的货物提供危险货物申报。中国运输条件鉴定书可作支持，但不替代目的地航段所需的正确IATA/IMDG文件。UN 38.3仅为运输要求，不能满足BSMD/GSO产品符合性或TRA型号核准。
gap.zht: 運輸層面在兩套制度間最為一致，因為UN 38.3是國際標準，中國出口與運入巴林均予認可。實際差距在於文件與路線，而非新增檢測：出口商須確保UN 38.3檢測摘要為最新並與具體電芯/電池組匹配，準備符合IATA DGR（空運）或IMDG（海運）的包裝、標記和標籤，並為運往巴林的貨物提供危險貨物申報。中國運輸條件鑑定書可作支持，但不替代目的地航段所需的正確IATA/IMDG文件。UN 38.3僅為運輸要求，不能滿足BSMD/GSO產品符合性或TRA型號核准。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for transport — UN 38.3 test summary plus IATA DGR (air) or IMDG (sea) compliant packaging, marking, labelling, and a dangerous-goods declaration are required for every lithium battery consignment shipped to Bahrain
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory on the export side — UN 38.3 testing and a transport-conditions appraisal report are required by Chinese carriers/forwarders before lithium batteries can be shipped out

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Transport is the most aligned layer: UN 38.3 is an international requirement recognised for both Chinese export and shipment into Bahrain. The exporter must keep a current UN 38.3 test summary matching the exact cell/pack and prepare IATA DGR (air) or IMDG (sea) compliant packaging, marking, labelling, and a dangerous-goods declaration for the Bahrain leg. The Chinese transport-conditions appraisal supports but does not replace destination-leg IATA/IMDG paperwork. UN 38.3 covers transport only and does not satisfy BSMD/GSO product conformity or TRA type approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 运输是最一致的层级：UN 38.3为国际要求，中国出口与运入巴林均予认可。出口商须保持与具体电芯/电池组匹配的最新UN 38.3检测摘要，并为巴林航段准备符合IATA DGR（空运）或IMDG（海运）的包装、标记、标签及危险货物申报。中国运输条件鉴定书可作支持，但不替代目的地航段的IATA/IMDG文件。UN 38.3仅涵盖运输，不能满足BSMD/GSO产品符合性或TRA型号核准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 運輸是最一致的層級：UN 38.3為國際要求，中國出口與運入巴林均予認可。出口商須保持與具體電芯/電池組匹配的最新UN 38.3檢測摘要，並為巴林航段準備符合IATA DGR（空運）或IMDG（海運）的包裝、標記、標籤及危險貨物申報。中國運輸條件鑑定書可作支持，但不替代目的地航段的IATA/IMDG文件。UN 38.3僅涵蓋運輸，不能滿足BSMD/GSO產品符合性或TRA型號核准。

source.publisher: UNECE — UN Manual of Tests and Criteria
